title: Eva manga still in the making
display_title: Eva manga still in the making
wikitext:
[]: Eva manga still in the making?             Quote Post by Kye7 » Mon Oct 31, 2011 6:47 am Was planing to read it on this site However, I noticed it stops a bit short... Have they not finished publishing all the novels? I recall somewhere that they would publish a book every 1.5 years, is this true? Also, it doesn't seem to be complete, according to myanimelsist. http://myanimelist.net/manga/698/Neon_Genesis_Evangelion Edit: The series is still in production, and Sadamoto has stated that he is planning to end the series in the 12th or 13th volume.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharkface » Mon Oct 31, 2011 7:38 am I have volumes one through twelve and twelve isn't where it ends, I'll have you know that much. I do however remember hearing that Sadamoto was supposed to be finishing it now that Viz is releasing the Manga ONCE AGAIN in the form of 'levels'. I read something about a thirteenth volume coming out, but I think it was rumored for this past summer but here we are with no final volume. I'd also like to add that I read it was supposedly being re-printed. If you look online you'll find that issues 7, 9 and 10 are all hard to find and when found cost an exuberant amount of money. Hopefully they are re-printed; I've only seen issue 12 in book stores lately along with Shinji Ikari Raising project and Campus Apocalypse.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Oct 31, 2011 7:38 am Vol 12 has been out for some time in English; Sadamoto has produced a couple of chapters that will be the start of vol 13, and which bring us into the start of episode 26'.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Oct 31, 2011 7:54 am Yes, it is still in production. Sadamoto works very slowly. You want to pay attention to this thread, where you will find information about Sadamoto's manga as it is being published: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/483/MANGA-NGE-New-Manga-Stage-Thread/

[]:             Quote Post by Kye7 » Mon Oct 31, 2011 4:55 pm Sharkface wrote: I have volumes one through twelve and twelve isn't where it ends, I'll have you know that much. I do however remember hearing that Sadamoto was supposed to be finishing it now that Viz is releasing the Manga ONCE AGAIN in the form of 'levels'. I read something about a thirteenth volume coming out, but I think it was rumored for this past summer but here we are with no final volume. I'd also like to add that I read it was supposedly being re-printed. If you look online you'll find that issues 7, 9 and 10 are all hard to find and when found cost an exuberant amount of money. Hopefully they are re-printed; I've only seen issue 12 in book stores lately along with Shinji Ikari Raising project and Campus Apocalypse.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Apr 30, 2013 1:19 am tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Apr 30, 2013 1:25 am Cool! Or better "hallelujah!". June issue should come out on 2 May, maybe scans could appear before that from past experience.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Tue Apr 30, 2013 1:41 am For a moment, I forgot about the existence of the manga series. Guess I got too caught up with Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by distopia » Tue Apr 30, 2013 1:44 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: Cool! Or better "hallelujah!". June issue should come out on 2 May, maybe scans could appear before that from past experience.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Tue Apr 30, 2013 4:04 am Ornette wrote: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]:             Quote Post by Marzan » Tue Apr 30, 2013 4:26 am Wow. I cannot believe this is ending! I'm so looking forward to how Sadamoto ends it.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Apr 30, 2013 7:13 am Here's to hoping he doesn't take a year hiatus between those two chapters.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Apr 30, 2013 7:36 am So... wanna begin the bets : Last A or Last B?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Apr 30, 2013 7:37 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Here's to hoping he doesn't take a year hiatus between those two chapters.

[]:             Quote Post by SimplyMason0 » Tue Apr 30, 2013 8:06 am ElMariachi wrote: So... wanna begin the bets : Last A or Last B?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Apr 30, 2013 8:29 am SimplyMason0 wrote: You mean the alternate endings to EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue Apr 30, 2013 2:10 pm At least he didn't wait to time the manga ending with the release of 4.0.
